description_long: This is a modern precision sniper rifle with a long, heavy barrel and a robust, tactical chassis. The rifle features a large telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for long-range accuracy, and a prominent muzzle brake at the end of the barrel to reduce recoil. The stock is adjustable and ergonomic, with a cheek rest and a buttpad for shooter comfort. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and the rifle includes a pistol grip for improved handling. The coloration is a mix of matte olive drab, tan, and black, with some metallic components exposed. The overall build suggests a high-powered, bolt-action firearm intended for precision shooting in urban or open environments.
description: A modern sniper rifle with a long barrel, large scope, adjustable stock, and detachable magazine, finished in matte olive drab and black. It features a prominent muzzle brake and tactical design elements for precision shooting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, scope, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, cheek rest, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, including the magazine, scope, and stock details.
